title: Missing man pages in installer (macOS)
body:
### Issue Description

Podman installed from an installer on macOS does not contain man pages. This causes usability issues, such as not being able to find configuration mechanism defined in here: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/23074

```
podman compose -f podman-compose.yaml build
>>>> Executing external compose provider "/usr/local/bin/docker-compose". Please see podman-compose(1) for how to disable this message. <<<<

$ man podman-compose
Unknown locale, assuming C
No manual entry for podman-compose
$ man podman
Unknown locale, assuming C
No manual entry for podman
```

Content of the installer:
```
pkgutil --payload-files podman-installer-macos-arm64.pkg
.
./podman
./podman/bin
./podman/bin/podman
./podman/bin/vfkit
./podman/bin/krunkit
./podman/bin/._krunkit
./podman/bin/gvproxy
./podman/bin/podman-mac-helper
./podman/._bin
./podman/lib
./podman/lib/libkrun-efi.dylib
./podman/lib/._libkrun-efi.dylib
./podman/lib/libepoxy.0.dylib
./podman/lib/._libepoxy.0.dylib
./podman/lib/libMoltenVK.dylib
./podman/lib/._libMoltenVK.dylib
./podman/lib/libvirglrenderer.1.dylib
./podman/lib/._libvirglrenderer.1.dylib
./podman/._lib
```

Podman details - Installed from Podman Desktop on macOS 15.1.1 (24B91)
```
$ podman -v
podman version 5.2.5



### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Install podman from the installer
2. `man podman`
3.


### Describe the results you received

No such man page was found.

### Describe the results you expected

Man page is found
